message:
Add Claude Marketplace documentation generator

Implement automated documentation generation for Claude plugins from the
tenzir/claude-plugins repository. This includes a new sync script that
generates landing and individual plugin pages, CI workflow integration
to run the generator at build time, and configuration updates to expose
the marketplace in the documentation sidebar. Plugin pages are generated
similar to changelog content—gitignored and built in CI only.

files.patch:
@@ -50,6 +50,10 @@ jobs:
         if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'
         run: pnpm generate:docs-map
 
+      - name: Generate Claude plugins
+        if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'
+        run: pnpm generate:claude-plugins
+
       - name: Setup GitHub Pages
         id: pages
         uses: actions/configure-pages@v5

@@ -14,6 +14,10 @@ src/content/docs/changelog/*
 src/sidebar-changelog.generated.ts
 src/unified-timeline-data.generated.ts
 
+# Claude plugins sync (generated content)
+.claude-plugins/
+src/content/docs/reference/claude-plugins/
+
 # Docs map (generated in CI)
 public/sitemap.md

@@ -8,8 +8,9 @@
     "build": "astro build",
     "preview": "astro preview",
     "astro": "astro",
-    "generate": "pnpm generate:changelog && pnpm generate:docs-map",
+    "generate": "pnpm generate:changelog && pnpm generate:docs-map && pnpm generate:claude-plugins",
     "generate:changelog": "node scripts/sync-changelog.mjs",
+    "generate:claude-plugins": "node scripts/sync-claude-plugins.mjs",
     "generate:docs-map": "node scripts/generate-docs-map.mjs",
     "sync:openapi": "bash scripts/sync-openapi.sh",
     "lint": "pnpm run lint:markdown && pnpm run lint:eslint && pnpm run lint:prettier",
